Author: LupusScintilla (inkandblade)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 691Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,544Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 290

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,739Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 26

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: First loves and other misunderstandings
entry.summary:
Author: BlueHourLetters

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,657Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 77

Summary: Stiles and Derek’s domestic routine is thrown off when they run into Derek’s high school ex-girlfriend, Paige, at a grocery store, and Stiles is blindsided by unexpected jealousy as he watches how warmly they reconnect.

entry.title: Performance Review
entry.summary:
Author: Nightowl_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,038Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: After a long day at the office, Derek Hale expects nothing more than to finish his paperwork and head home. Instead, his best employee, Stiles Stilinski, walks into his office demanding answers about his performance review—and refusing to leave until he gets what he wants. What starts as a tense conversation about raises quickly spirals into something far more dangerous when Stiles offers to help his married, closeted boss "blow off some steam." Before Derek knows it, he’s bent over his own desk, taking his employee's massive cock like the desperate size queen he’s tried so hard to hide. Or the one where Derek Hale is a straight, married boss who gets absolutely railed by his younger, hung employee on company time—that leaves him leaking and asking for round two the next night.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski: Emotional Support Human & Werewolf Chew Toy
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 115,129Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 229

Summary: Stiles has options. You’re just along for the ride — so hop into Roscoe and see where this goes.Bring your Stiles body pillow. You might need it. Scott gets bitten.Everything changes. Suddenly, the world is louder, sharper, and a whole lot more dangerous — and the only thing keeping Scott from losing control is his loud-mouthed, chaos-magnet best friend, Stiles. Which would be fine.Except it’s not just Scott. Derek’s watching.Peter’s interested.And for some reason, everyone is getting a little too intense about Stiles Stilinski. Now Stiles is stuck in the middle of werewolves, bad decisions, and a rapidly escalating situation he definitely did not sign up for — while trying very hard not to think about what it means to be the thing grounding them all. Because this?This is not normal. And it’s only going to get worse.

entry.title: Another Poly Story
entry.summary:
Author: HolmesMoriarty

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,417Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 57

Summary: “That’s what I wanted to talk to you about.” Stiles’ world falls apart after hearing this. It was a normal day, like any other, when his boyfriend of five years prepared a meal for them inside their apartment. Stiles thought he would be getting engaged tonight because he had never seen Derek cook even once. It was always Stiles’ thing, so he expected something, but not that.... “Stiles?” Derek asks as Stiles is frozen in place. His boyfriend sighs. “You don’t like the idea.” Of course, Stiles doesn’t!!! “What... Derek.” He closes his eyes, trying to breathe correctly. “Where is this coming from?” Derek opens his mouth, but Stiles isn’t done. “We’ve been together for five years, not once you expressed that you might be polyamorous. Not even once. So, you, asking out of the blue to open our relationship, doesn’t make much sense.”

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A Whole Lot of Love
entry.summary:
Author: AnOldFriendForDinner

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,133Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: Stiles would do anything for the pack despite thinking he only belongs on the fringes. When he starts to spiral, Derek and Peter realise just what they'd do for him in return. If his happiness is a battle, then Derek and Peter are determined to make sure Stiles wins — through hell and high water, healing, and a relationship as unconventional as they are, they'll do anything to keep him safe.

entry.title: a problem that doesn't want to be solved
entry.summary:
Author: wishingonalightningbolt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 111,600Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 366

Summary: Derek is an executive at Hale Publishing. Stiles is his assistant—his assistant who's 23 years younger than him. So Derek really shouldn't...notice him. The way that he does. -0- Stiles is attractive. Derek knows that. He’s not blind. Sometimes, not often, Derek finds himself—looking. Admiring. Stiles is tall and fit, broad shoulders that taper to a trim waist, an ass that Derek shouldn’t be checking out as often as he does, firm and high. Derek isn’t ignorant to his own fluid sexuality. He used to fuck men, back in the day, when he was twenty and single and easy. But then he was with Jennifer, and since the divorce it’s just seemed…less complicated. To date women. But he likes men—aesthetically. Sexually. He likes Stiles more than he should. And it’s weird not because he’s a man but because Derek has literally never had this problem before. He’s never been attracted to one of his assistants, ever. Then again, none of his assistants have been anything like Stiles.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Stiles and his seven wolves
entry.summary:
Author: Luciusnguyen

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,152Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 202

Summary: At the age of 11, Stiles discovered that he could talk to animals! And then things just escalated from there. Okay, so I rewatched Snow White and the Seven Dwarves recently and then I thought, what if Stiles could talk to animals? Like an Animal Whisperer? What would happen if Stiles could do that and how the story would be different if Stiles had power from the beginning? And then I did some research and holy cow, I found something very interesting in Poland's folklore. Thus, I used it in my story, I hope you guys like it. P/s: I’m really, really bad at writing summaries :(

entry.title: Rip My Ribcage Open (And Devour What Is Truly Yours)
entry.summary:
Author: Welsh_Woman

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,468Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 356

Summary: After so many years of fighting all the strange shit that Beacon Hills throws at them, the McCall Pack are a little leery when they are visited by a Pack that claims they're there to help them become more of a team, more of a family...When the Hale Pack arrive and speak of a long standing claim to the Beacon Hills territory, Scott is instantly suspicious and combative, but Stiles wants to know who these newcomers are and what they can share.And why he feels so drawn to their Alpha, to a man that seems to be just as entranced by Stiles, despite the fact that he holds a secret that might topple the fraught bonds the McCall Pack share.

entry.title: Same But Different
entry.summary:
Author: Reiko009

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 63,228Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 142

Summary: “Let me help, love.” Peter pulled away, which made Derek almost whimper at the loss of contact. The new pet name was only used when they were alone like this. Somehow the word was both too weak to describe what their coupling actually meant and a far more intimate endearment than what Derek felt that he deserved. What they were doing wasn’t love so much as need. He could sense his wolf curling protectively around what belonged to him, what anchored him, and what strengthened him as the Alpha. True, his pack was small: just him and Peter. But that was enough – for now. A spicy reimagining of Season 2. Old foes and a new threat emerge, all while the Hale wolves begin to fall for a very human high schooler with deep brown eyes and a loud mouth. Expect a lot of familiar plot points from the canon, just with a twist. Mostly an excuse to write uncle/nephew werewolf smut.

entry.title: The Beacon Hills Pack House (or, Four Grown Men and a Baby Wolf)
entry.summary:
Author: Owl_actually_writes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,939Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Two years after the war with the Hunters ended, Stiles and Derek are married, Scott and Isaac are living in their guest rooms, and Liam has unofficially (officially) been adopted by the entire chaotic pack. It’s a full house. Between Stiles’ FBI remote work, Derek’s surprising skill as a stay-at-home-werewolf-husband, and Scott trying to ignore that he’s still hopelessly in love with his ex-boyfriend Isaac, something’s got to give. Tonight, it does. Or: The one where Scott finally stops being a martyr and takes what he wants, Liam accidentally walks in on something he can't un-see, and Derek and Stiles have the most normal marriage in Beacon Hills—which is saying something.

entry.title: The Extremely Illegal Courtship of Derek Hale
entry.summary:
Author: DarkInsanity (Stereklenidus)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,529Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 70

Summary: Deputy Derek Hale has a problem. Technically, several problems. There’s the increasingly theatrical thief called The Fox currently robbing corrupt elites across Beacon Hills while leaving behind gold-inked calling cards, personalized notes, and deeply invasive opinions about Derek’s skincare routine. There’s Derek’s very normal and completely professional evidence wall. There’s Erica openly referring to the criminal as Derek’s “murder boyfriend.” And then there’s Stiles Stilinski. Chaos gremlin. Sheriff’s son. Chronic trespasser. Flirtatious menace in oversized hoodies who keeps appearing at crime scenes, stealing Derek’s fries, patching him up after bad shifts, and smiling at him like Derek personally hung the moon. Derek is definitely not in love with either of them. Unfortunately for his sanity, they turn out to be the same person.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Derek Hale & Stiles Stilinski
  • Derek
  • Stiles Stilinski
  • Laura Hale
  • Erica Reyes
  • Alternate Universe - Modern Setting
  • Thief Stiles Stilinski
  • Police Officer Derek Hale
  • Mutual Pining
  • Slow Burn
  • Laura Hale Lives
  • Erica Reyes Lives
  • Everyone Ships Sterek

entry.title: Between the Sheets
entry.summary:
Author: simplyn2deep

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,160Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 75

Summary: When Stiles accidentally buys the wrong bedsheets for Derek’s new apartment, it turns into the start of something neither of them was ready to name.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
